build._doc: Wrap every *.json in src/data/ as a globalThis.PORTAL_DATA[<key>] companion (data-*.json.js). Engine: front-data-json-js-wrapper.sh.
Ship the wrapped data-*.json.js companions to dist/ root, so HTML can load them with <script src="data-<KEY>.json.js"></script> — no fetch, no CORS.
Inject navigator.serviceWorker.register(...) before </head>. MUST run BEFORE esbuild_sw so the modified HTML feeds into BUILD_HASH.
build.files: affine-api.html, authelia-api.html, c3-api.html, c3-infra-mcp-api.html, c3-services-mcp-api.html, crawlee-api.html, index.html, mailu-api.html, matomo-api.html, mattermost-api.html, nocodb-api.html, ntfy-api.html, photoprism-api.html, radicale-api.html, syncthing-api.html, unix-mcp.html, vaultwarden-api.html, windmill-api.html

build._doc: Inject single-namespace observability SDK (Sentry/OpenObserve-style). Mirrors console.* + errors + SW lifecycle to OPFS console.log. window.consoleLogs.{captureException, captureMessage, addBreadcrumb, read, readJSON, tail, clear, download}.
build.files: affine-api.html, authelia-api.html, c3-api.html, c3-infra-mcp-api.html, c3-services-mcp-api.html, crawlee-api.html, index.html, mailu-api.html, matomo-api.html, mattermost-api.html, nocodb-api.html, ntfy-api.html, photoprism-api.html, radicale-api.html, syncthing-api.html, unix-mcp.html, vaultwarden-api.html, windmill-api.html

build._doc: MUST run last — hashes the dist artifacts above to derive BUILD_HASH and inject it into the SW bundle.
